title: App crashes on iPhone 14
description: User reports app crashes immediately after opening on iPhone 14 running iOS 17. Reinstalling did not help.
resolution: Found that iOS 17 introduced a new privacy permission for local network access. Added the required permission key to Info.plist and released hotfix update.

title: Cannot export report to PDF
description: User clicks export to PDF button but nothing happens. No error message shown. Works fine for Excel export.
resolution: Browser popup blocker was silently blocking the PDF download. Guided user to allow popups from our domain in browser settings. PDF exported successfully.

title: Slack integration not posting notifications
description: User set up Slack integration but no notifications are being posted to their channel even though events are being triggered.
resolution: The Slack webhook URL had expired after 90 days. User regenerated the webhook URL in Slack settings and updated it in our integration settings. Notifications started working immediately.

title: Forgot password link expired too quickly
description: User received password reset email but by the time they clicked the link it had already expired. They work in a different timezone.
resolution: Our password reset links were set to expire in 15 minutes which was too short for users in different timezones. Extended expiry to 60 minutes and sent user a new reset link.

title: Invoice PDF showing wrong currency
description: Customer in Europe is seeing invoices in USD instead of EUR even though their account is set to EUR.
resolution: Found a bug where the invoice generation was always defaulting to USD regardless of account currency setting. Applied hotfix to use account currency setting. Regenerated affected invoices.
